cases.title: Create post
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can create a new post.
**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Click Create post
2. Upload image
3. Add caption
4. Click Post

**Expected result :**
Post is published successfully.

cases.title: Delete post
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can delete own post.


**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open own post
2. Click options menu
3. Select Delete
4. Confirm

**Expected result :**
Post is deleted successfully.
cases.preconditions: User has at least one post.

cases.title: Like post
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can like a post.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open feed
2. Click Like on a post

**Expected result :**
The post was liked successfully.

cases.title: Add comment
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can comment on a post.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open post
2. Enter comment text
3. Click Post

**Expected result :**
Comment appears under post.

cases.title: Unlike post
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can remove like from a post.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open liked post
2. Click Unlike

**Expected result :**
The like has been successfully removed.
